description: Fetch an encrypted group metadata blob by locator

main.description: Download an encrypted metadata blob. Returns raw encrypted bytes. The blob is opaque — decryption requires the MLS epoch key derived by group members. Clients should pass both convoId (stable application conversation) and groupId (MLS crypto context) when available; older clients may pass groupId only.

blobLocator.description: Optional blob locator. When omitted or empty, returns the latest blob for the group.

convoId.description: Stable conversation identifier. When provided, membership is checked against the conversation and latest-blob lookup is scoped to the conversation, surviving MLS group rotations.

groupId.description: Hex-encoded MLS group ID for the blob's crypto context. Required for legacy group-scoped lookups; recommended with convoId so clients fetch metadata encrypted for the expected MLS group.

resetGeneration.description: Optional conversation reset generation to disambiguate metadata after MLS group rotations.

metadataVersion.description: Optional encrypted metadata version from the MLS MetadataReference.

kind.description: Blob kind. Defaults to 'metadata'. Avatar blobs use 'avatar'.

errors.name: BlobNotFound
errors.description: Metadata blob does not exist or has been garbage collected
